plans.name: Free
plans.description: For individuals starting out, with 5 meetings per month complete with summaries, transcription, and search.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For individuals and small teams who want basic transcription, search, and premium integrations.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For individuals and teams who want video playback and other supercharged capabilities.

plans.name: Enterprise+
plans.description: For larger teams and organizations who need security and controls for scale.
